name: High-risk medical AI device
description: Medical AI diagnostic system, NOT open source, confirmed high-risk. Has good docs, logging, risk docs, human oversight. Art.15 non_compliant due to no robustness testing.

art6.reasoning: Medical device under Annex I, Regulation (EU) 2017/745

art5.legal_basis: Art. 5(1): no prohibited practices detected — all 4 categories checked with high confidence

art6.legal_basis: Art. 6(1): medical device under Annex I (Regulation (EU) 2017/745) confirmed high-risk — requires conformity assessment and CE marking obligations under Art. 6

art9.legal_basis: Art. 9(1)-(9): risk management system required for high-risk AI; has_risk_docs=true and has_risk_code_patterns=true provide evidence, but needs human verification of completeness (PARTIAL)

art10.legal_basis: Art. 10(1)-(6): data governance required for high-risk AI; has_data_governance_doc=true, has_bias_mitigation=true, has_data_lineage=true — evidence found but needs human verification (PARTIAL)

art11.legal_basis: Art. 11(1): technical documentation required for high-risk AI; has_technical_docs=true with multiple docs but only 3 documented_aspects — may not cover all Annex IV requirements (PARTIAL)

art12.legal_basis: Art. 12(1)-(4): automatic recording of events required for high-risk AI; has_logging=true but has_retention_config=false — retention policy required per Art. 12(3)

art13.legal_basis: Art. 13(2)-(3): instructions for use required for high-risk AI; has_explainability=true but has_transparency_info=false — no user-facing transparency documentation found

art14.legal_basis: Art. 14(1)-(5): human oversight required for high-risk AI; has_human_oversight=true and has_override_mechanism=true — evidence found but needs human verification of completeness (PARTIAL)

art15.legal_basis: Art. 15(1)-(5): accuracy, robustness and cybersecurity required for high-risk AI; has_accuracy_testing=true but has_robustness_testing=false — robustness testing missing

art50.legal_basis: Art. 50(1)-(4): system is not a chatbot, does not generate synthetic content, no emotion recognition, no deep fakes — no Art. 50 paragraphs apply
